title: Sai_Craft: The Cheese Dimension
description: A mod that adds cheesemaking, as well as a whole cheese-themed dimension
body:
Sai_Craft is my first attempt at making a Minecraft mod. Naturally, as a huge cheese-lover, I couldn't imagine a better theme for it!

This mod includes:

A Coagulator block that turns milk into cheese curds. Place it next to a villager to give it the Cheesemaker profession!
15+ types of cheese, with their respective blocks
THE CHEESE DIMENSION, with unique stuctures, biomes and mobs!
Some references to my previous projects (I tried not to be too obnoxious about it, so that people other than my friends can enjoy the mod)

You will probably need to download Geckolib as a dependancy for this mod to work. Future updates are possible, I already have a few ideas I might add later!

Thank you and enjoy!

- Alef

P.S This mod was originally posted on curseforge half a year ago. If for whatever reason you want to see its older versions, they are all there
